Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' that occur after exactly one 'Completed + Resolved' without intermediate waiting states

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' among all terminal activities (i.e., compared to 'Completed + In Call', 'Completed + Cancelled')

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' executed by resources from the 'Org line C' organizational line

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' that are preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress' within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in cases that started with 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' relative to the total number of 'Completed + Resolved' executions
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in variants with performance duration below the median variant performance

Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all cases

Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' in variants that do not contain any 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all cases where 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' does not happen
